rows.notes: Consensus from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Clear header text with no monetary amounts.
Based on visual verification, the description is 'Hills pensions' without a brace, matching gemini-flash. Classified as a header as it's a structural label with no monetary amounts.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly pension paid to Philips, due to Midsummer 1733, amounting to £0 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£0 s15 d0) are by consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, as the '£' symbol is visible and 'do' (ditto) is clearly written, not '30'.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly pension paid to Burroughs, due to Midsummer 1733.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly pension paid to Burroughs, due to Midsummer 1733, amounting to £0 15s 0d.

rows.description: Bursariis pro Imp: Coll: et Nota Domus.
rows.notes: Description 'Bursariis pro Imp: Coll: et Nota Domus.' is from visual verification, matching gemini-flash. Classified as 'header' as it introduces subsequent entries without having an amount itself, aligning with the supervisor protocol.
rows.section_header: Bursariis pro Imp: Coll: et Nota Domus.

rows.description: ALLd Mr. Atwell for Battles not recd 1726. 1727.
rows.notes: Amounts (£20 s18 d0) based on visual verification; gemini-flash's shillings '18' and pence '0' are correct, gpt-5-mini's '16' and '4' are incorrect. Description fully transcribed as 'ALLd Mr. Atwell for Battles not recd 1726. 1727.' based on image, overriding gpt-5-mini's missing 'ALLd' and 'Battles'.
rows.section_header: Bursariis pro Imp: Coll: et Nota Domus.
rows.english_description: Payment allowed to Mr Atwell for battels (student board charges) not received for 1726–1727.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment allowed to Mr Atwell for battels not received for 1726–1727, amounting to £20 18s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£28 s3 d8) are by consensus. Description 'Mr Bayleys Executor for do' taken from gemini-flash, as no period after 'Bayleys' is visible.
rows.section_header: Bursariis pro Imp: Coll: et Nota Domus.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Bayley's executor for battels not received (same purpose as preceding entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Bayley's executor for battels not received, amounting to £28 3s 8d.

rows.notes: Description 'Dno Rectori et Sociis' from visual verification, combining gemini-flash's 'Dno' with gpt-5-mini's correct capitalization of 'Sociis'. Classified as a header as it's a section label without amounts.

Amounts (£17 s13 d4) based on visual verification; gpt-5-mini's shillings '13' is correct, gemini-flash's '3' is incorrect. Description 'Ad Fest: Nat: £ stipend: ec' taken from gemini-flash, which accurately reflects the text.
rows.english_description: Stipend paid to the Rector and Fellows at the Feast of the Nativity (Christmas).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to the Rector and Fellows at the Feast of the Nativity (Christmas), amounting to £17 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£22 s10 d0) are by consensus. Description '£ pro Aug: S:New: et Merton' from visual verification, including the '£' symbol and 'S:New:'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the augmentation relating to South Newington and Merton to the Rector and Fellows, amounting to £22 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£27 s13 d4) are by consensus. Description 'Ad Fest. Annua. £ stipendi: ec.' taken from gemini-flash, which is visually more accurate.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual stipend paid to the Rector and Fellows at the annual feast, amounting to £27 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£17 s5 d1) are by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, including the '£' symbol and 'part:'. Pence '1' is visually clear.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of three parts of the augmentation from Cuddington to the Rector and Fellows, amounting to £17 5s 1d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£15 s13 d4) are by consensus. Description 'AdFest. S: Joh: £ stipend: ec' taken from gemini-flash, which is visually more accurate.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to the Rector and Fellows at the Feast of St John (Midsummer), amounting to £15 13s 4d.

rows.description: £ pro ¼ta parte Augm: de Cudlington

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of one quarter part of the augmentation from Cuddington to the Rector and Fellows, amounting to £7 4s 1.75d.

rows.description: Ad Fest: S Mich: £ pro Augm: de Longwitenham ec

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment at Michaelmas for the augmentation of the living of Long Wittenham to the Rector and Fellows, amounting to £17 0s 7d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£19 s0 d0) are by consensus. Description from gemini-flash, including the '£' symbol.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the augmentation of Guinear to the Rector and Fellows, amounting to £19 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Amounts based on visual verification and gemini-flash: pence is '0' followed by a '¾' symbol. The horizontal rule indicates this is a subtotal. Gpt-5-mini's pence '1' is incorrect.

Amounts (£636 s14 d6, fraction 0.75) are by consensus. Description 'Summa omnium Receptorum' based on visual verification, 'Receptorum' spelling is clearer and more typical Latin, matching gpt-5-mini.
Consensus from gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini for both description and amounts, including the '¾' fraction.

Description 'Sic Debentur Smo Computanti' based on visual verification, using 'Smo' from gemini-flash. Amounts from visual verification, pence '6' followed by a '¾' fraction, as noted by gpt-5-mini (gemini-flash missed the fraction).

Description 'Jo: Howell Rect.' from visual verification, matching gemini-flash. Classified as 'entry' as per protocol for a specific record/acknowledgement (signature). Gpt-5-mini's 'Atwell' is incorrect.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Signature of Jo. Howell, Rector (no amount listed).

rows.notes: Description 'Mem. Summa in superiori computo' from visual verification, using correct capitalization (Mem. capitalized, 'superiori' and 'computo' lowercase). Row type by consensus.

rows.description: Rectori Debita extracta fuit e Thesauro Nov. 2do 1733.
rows.notes: Description 'Rectori Debita extracta fuit e Thesauro Nov. 2do 1733.' from visual verification, matching gemini-flash. Classified as 'entry' as it's a specific record of an action, not a general section header. Gpt-5-mini's 'Rector' is incorrect.
